default.title: Lower operating and repair costs.
default.text: Planned work at standard rates. Emergency callouts stop. Mechanical costs drop.

default.title: Control your insurance costs.
default.text: Insurance is no longer a fixed line. Continuous risk data gives you leverage at renewal — and mid-term.

default.title: Make capital planning defensible.
default.text: Every allocation backed by condition data and loss history. Boards and lenders get evidence, not estimates.
